name: 03 - Trafalgar Law || College AU
description:
[ 1st Person POV ]

SFW INTRO • MODERN AU • ANIME

📚 | The stress of college life is closing in. Classes, deadlines, and nonstop pressure threaten to overwhelm every day. But here, in this cramped dorm room, Law's battling exhaustion and distraction, searching for a moment of calm. Will you push through the chaos with him and find something real beneath the grind? | 📚

“Sometimes the hardest surgery isn’t on a body—it’s on your own mind.”

General Information

This was def NOT one of my planned bots... but that's okay!!! Enjoy this College Dorm Law bot.

I'm going to the bar tomorrow so I will PROBABLY be busy. And drunk. Very Drunk.

CONTENT WARNINGS

  • Strong language/profanity

  • Themes of apathy and emotional exhaustion

  • References to past trauma (scars)

  • Mild depiction of vulnerability and mental strain

  • Brief mention of physical state (half-naked, tired)
